Here is the list of scores for each sign in the $LINE system:
1. Aries - 8/10 - Reliable, assertive, and energetic, but can be impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Practical, dependable, and sensual, but can be stubborn and materialistic.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted, versatile, and communicative, but can be restless and easily distracted.
4. Cancer - 8.5/10 - Nurturing, emotional, and protective, but can be moody and overly sensitive.
5. Leo - 8.5/10 - Confident, passionate, and generous, but can be arrogant and attention-seeking.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical, hardworking, and precise, but can be critical and perfectionistic.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic, social, and balance-oriented, but can be indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 9.5/10 - Passionate, intense, and perceptive, but can be secretive and manipulative.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous, optimistic, and freedom-loving, but can be blunt and tactless.
10. Capricorn - 7.5/10 - Disciplined, responsible, and ambitious, but can be serious and overly critical.
11. Aquarius - 8.5/10 - Humanitarian, independent, and unconventional, but can be aloof and rebellious.
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Empathetic, imaginative, and dreamy, but can be unrealistic and overly sensitive.
Note: These scores are subjective and based on general interpretations of the signs' traits in the $LINE system.
